comments.enable_federated_learning: Set to true to contribute/fetch model updates from web-assistant federated learning server. Requires web-assistant running.
comments.user_id: Unique identifier for this Pi robot in the ecosystem. Used for federated learning and data tracking.
comments.web_assistant_url: URL of web-assistant Flask backend for optional integration.
comments.federated_server_url: URL of federated learning server (usually same as web_assistant_url).
